headline: Some cried. Others were speechless. How front-line workers walked away with checks averaging $240,000, nearly equal Wall Street bonuses, when KKR sold their company
summary: They knew they were getting a payout. But employees at CoolIT had no idea just how much they'd profit from KKR's sale of their employer.
